epigraph: “The early morning has gold in its mouth.” — Franklin

messages.preview: This isn’t live is it? Will need to get photo permission if we use these…
Hmm. Doesn’t work centre frame does it. Leave it with me
Please see attached an email about the Parkinson’s Nurse service in Gloucestershire. If anyone is struggling and needs any advice or support
Don’t take chances with CO alarms - if it is sounding leave the area and make sure ventilated - they can give a false alarm but veer on the

tasks.text: Brian. Book meeting Prep for Caroline
Get testimonial quote from CEO of Parkinson's UK (on-on-one in two weeks).

lead.headline: Teresa's resignation requires immediate attention and transition planning.
lead.deck: With no timeline specified on this task, clarity is needed now on her departure date and what handover needs to happen before she leaves. This directly impacts team capacity and any projects she's stewarding.
